name: intelligit
description: An Electron application with React and TypeScript
author: example.com

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.dev:test: npm run build:sidecar && cross-env ELECTRON_MODE=test electron-vite dev
scripts.dev:main: npm run build:sidecar && cross-env ELECTRON_MODE=main electron-vite dev
scripts.build: npm run build:sidecar && npm run typecheck && electron-vite build
scripts.build:unpack: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --dir -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
scripts.build:win: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
scripts.build:mac: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --linux
